title: What I think about Trump as President

enrichment.summary: Kyle shares his evolving opinion on Trump winning the 2016 election, initially reluctant but trying to find positives. He compares Trump's corruption unfavorably to Hillary Clinton's, then pivots into an extended argument about immigration, white Judeo-Christian cultural superiority, and his belief that importing third-world workers depresses wages and threatens American cultural cohesion.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Reluctantly supportive — prefers unity over opposition and hopes Trump's transparency could refresh politics
Hillary is more corrupt than Trump despite Trump's personal flaws
Dumb and self-destructive businessman, but not uniquely corrupt
Mass immigration of third-world workers suppresses wages and threatens American cultural fabric
Believes it is genetically and culturally superior due to centuries of social development
Immigration backlash was the primary driver — voters' only outlet against elite-driven labor policy
Trump's bluntness, even the 'pussy' comment, is preferable to the fake performative polish of Clinton and Obama
Corporations deliberately import cheap foreign labor to suppress wages and keep workers poor

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks he'll do a YouTube video about Donald Trump becoming president.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle did a video a couple weeks ago about Donald Trump versus Hillary Clinton.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle said he would vote for Hillary Clinton in the 2016 election.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle voted for Gary Johnson four years ago.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump is a bad businessman who went bankrupt six times.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: One of Donald Trump's bankruptcies involved casinos in Atlantic City, including the Mario Lago and another unnamed casino.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump opened Trump Tower, which put his other casinos out of business.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump tried to sell Trump vodka to the Russians.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump's airline didn't do well because he spent too much money outfitting it for short business trips around the East Coast.

claims.claim: Kyle did a video about Donald Trump in 2008 because he liked his style on The Apprentice.

claims.claim: Donald Trump was a Democrat three years ago.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump is friends with progressive people like Jesse Ventura.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle's philosophy is to support the president because it's a way to keep unity for the country.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump's presence in the White House could change the political atmosphere, similar to how Bernie Sanders' presence influenced Hillary Clinton.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump could turn the White House into a reality show by filming business meetings with his cabinet and holding press conferences.

claims.subject: Hillary Clinton
claims.claim: Hillary Clinton repealed the Glass-Steagall Act, which was put in place to prevent another Great Depression.

claims.subject: Hillary Clinton
claims.claim: Hillary Clinton took hundreds of thousands of dollars from bankers.

claims.subject: Hillary Clinton
claims.claim: Hillary Clinton got the DNC to funnel democratic money to her ads, which was unfair to Bernie Sanders.

claims.subject: Hillary Clinton
claims.claim: Hillary Clinton took millions of dollars from the King of Morocco and Saudi Arabia for the Clinton Foundation.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes Hillary Clinton appears to be more corrupt than Donald Trump.

claims.subject: Donald Trump
claims.claim: Donald Trump's immigration stance was a major reason he won the election.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle has a friend who supported Trump because he felt isolated working with Indian programmers who spoke Hindi and took jobs from Americans.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes America is a white Christian country with a strong Judeo-Christian culture that has developed over thousands of years.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks white people are genetically better at creating a healthy society due to their European background.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle believes that bringing third-world immigrants to America can create a third-world environment in the country.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Kyle thinks that if he were in a situation where he couldn't get a job because of foreign workers, he would vote for Trump.

transcript.text: Hello, I think I'll do a YouTube video. Stone, stoned YouTube video. What I think about Donald Trump becoming president. Because I did a video a couple weeks ago. Request video. Like, what do I think about Donald Trump versus Hillary? What am I going to vote for? And I said I'd vote for Hillary Clinton. I voted for Gary Johnson four years ago.
